label: fabricated
reason: No such rule exists in the Federal Register, 40 CFR Part 120 does not govern WOTUS exemptions, and the described blanket waiver of Army Corps pre-notice for wetland filling contradicts established Clean Water Act regulatory structure.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 96
REASON: No such EPA Final Rule exists at 91 Fed. Reg. 18,442 (Feb. 2026); 40 CFR Part 120 does not govern WOTUS exemptions, Section 404 jurisdiction remains with the Army Corps of Engineers, and the described blanket exemption from Corps pre-notice for wetland filling contradicts established CWA regulatory structure and post-Sackett rulemaking history.
